[REPORT-001 | 2026-07-11 09:04 | SMS] Old Bus Stand side: 14 families, drinking water finished at 08:30. Two children have diarrhoea. Caller says the east lane is flooded.

[REPORT-002 | 09:07 | WhatsApp, Hinglish] Bus stand ke piche 18 log hain, 3 elderly, pani aa gaya north embankment mein. Hamara ghar dub raha hai. Teenager aur ek pregnant lady hai.

[REPORT-003 | 09:12 | OCR] "OLB BUS STN - 1B famly - watr nil - 3 old ppl - brdge rd closd"

[REPORT-004 | 09:15 | Volunteer update] REPORT-001 and REPORT-003 probably describe the same households; REPORT-002 may be a different lane behind the same landmark. Verify before combining counts.

[REPORT-005 | 09:18 | Hindi] गर्भवती महिला को दवा चाहिए। क्लिनिक रोड पर पेड़ गिरा है। छोटी गाड़ी शायद निकल सकती है लेकिन एम्बुलेंस नहीं।

[REPORT-006 | 09:22 | Social media, unverified] Main bridge has completely collapsed and 200 people are trapped. No source or photo metadata.

[REPORT-007 | 09:27 | Police radio] Main bridge is damaged, not collapsed. One pedestrian lane remains open. Heavy vehicles prohibited. Rescue boats can launch from South Ghat.

[REPORT-008 | 09:31 | Shelter lead] Community Hall capacity 80. Registered 67. Nine arrivals are waiting outside and may include four already counted at School Shelter.

[REPORT-009 | 09:34 | School Shelter] Capacity 45. Current register 41, but one room with 12 beds is unusable because of electrical damage.

[REPORT-010 | 09:38 | Inventory] Central store: 36 water packs, 18 ORS sachets, 4 tarpaulins, insulin stock unknown, two small vans, one high-clearance truck.

[REPORT-011 | 09:41 | Clinic] 19 insulin-dependent patients are listed; 12 insulin doses remain. Two patients may be duplicates transferred from Ward 2 yesterday.

[REPORT-012 | 09:45 | Field team] North road blocked. South lane open to motorcycles and small vans. High-clearance truck can reach South Ghat but not Clinic Road.

[REPORT-013 | 09:49 | Voice transcript, Hinglish] River bank pe 6 log, do bachche aur ek dadi. Paani kamar tak. Location old pump house ke paas. Boat chahiye.

[REPORT-014 | 09:53 | SMS] Four adults on a terrace near Old Pump House. Need boat. Could be same group as REPORT-013, but count and vulnerable details differ.

[REPORT-015 | 09:57 | Medical desk] Pregnant patient from REPORT-005 has chest pain, not only medication need. Latest location: textile godown gate, not Clinic Road.

[REPORT-016 | 10:03 | Logistics] One small van is reserved for oxygen cylinder delivery. Second van has wheelchair ramp. Truck fuel supports approximately three South Ghat trips.

[REPORT-017 | 10:08 | Coordinator note] Do not automatically dispatch. Reconcile duplicates, identify life-safety cases, calculate shortages, and propose a review-required sequence.

[REPORT-018 | 10:12 | Relief camp] Dry food available for 60 person-days. Water purification unit can serve 120 people/day but road access requires the small van.

[REPORT-019 | 10:18 | Field radio] East road transformer zone is unsafe within 50 metres. Utility isolation confirmation pending.

[REPORT-020 | 10:24 | Final update] Community Hall safe capacity reduced from 80 to 43 because one hall is unsafe. Existing registered count remains 67; relocation is required.
